name: Civilian shelter, rent support, and protected displacement hubs
predicted_outcome: If funded and protected, repeated displacement should fall, improvised shelter overcrowding should ease, and secondary mortality from eviction and exposure should decline.

name: Monitored Hormuz and Red Sea deconfliction corridor
predicted_outcome: Shared convoy rules, verified hotline logs, and faster agency handoffs should cut proxy-triggered shipping incidents and humanitarian delivery delays.

name: Sanctions carve-outs tied to food, fuel, and household utility imports
predicted_outcome: Household income stress, food debt, and utility arrears should stabilize faster, reducing incentives for further displacement and militia recruitment.

name: IAEA access restoration with escrowed sensor feeds
predicted_outcome: Verified monitoring should narrow rumor space around breakout timelines and improve diplomatic credibility for ceasefire and sanctions negotiations.

name: Regional anti-disinformation cell with verified ceasefire messaging
predicted_outcome: Public trust in alerts, evacuation instructions, and diplomatic announcements should recover enough to improve compliance and reduce panic-driven escalation.

name: Joint cyber defense surge for ports, desalination, and hospital grids
predicted_outcome: Hardening exposed infrastructure should reduce blackout-driven humanitarian collapse and limit proxy escalation through civilian system failures.
